bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship
bracu_official.summary: A law graduate from BRAC University received a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.
